title: Protocol for performing PINK1 siRNA knockdown in mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"74vc4","text":"This protocol details the siRNA knockdown in mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) for PINK1, but applicable for any other target.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: For Primary MEFs seed 200,000 cells per well in a 6-well plate at a total volume of 2 mL .
Add 400 µL of RNA-free water.

Incubate in hood for 00:05:00 , vortex vigorously and store at -20 °C . The protocol can be amended if the nmol quantity of siRNA purchased is higher/lower by adjusting the resuspension to ensure a final [ 10 micromolar (µM) ] concentration.

Prepare mastermix according to the number of wells. Four tubes have to be prepared, 2 with Optimem and lipofectamine and one each with the PINK1 and scramble siRNA respectively. For PINK1 knockdown a final concentration of 25 nM of siRNA in each well is used.
Tube 2: Per well - 10 µL of Lipofectamine diluted in 100 µL of siRNA-OPTI-MEM
Tube 3 scramble siRNA Per well - 5 µL of scramble siRNA at [ 10 micromolar (µM) ] diluted in 100 µL OPTI-MEM
Tube 4 (same as tube 2) Per well - 10 µL of Lipofectamine diluted in 100 µL of siRNA-OPTI-MEM
For Immortalised MEFs seed 100,000 cells per well in a 6-well plate at a total volume of 2 mL .
Resuspend the dried siRNA – protocol for 5 nmol of purchased siRNA to reconstitute at [ 10 micromolar (µM) ].
Add 100 µL of 5x siRNA Buffer.
Tube1 PINK1 siRNA: Per well - 5 µL of PINK1 siRNA at [ 10 micromolar (µM) ] diluted in 100 µL OPTI-MEMTube 3
Vortex slowly and combine the content of Tube 1 with tube 2 (PINK1 siRNA) and similarly with tube 3 and 4.
Vortex again slowly and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

Add drop by drop, 200 µL of PINK1 siRNA mix to each well for PINK1 KD and similarly of the scramble siRNA for controls. For an experiment with 4x 6 well plates (WT and mutant cells treated with scramble or PINK1 the following volumes can be used: Tube1 and tube 3: 60 µL siRNA + 1200 µL OPtiMEM Tube 2 and 4: 120 µL of lipofectamine + 1200 µL of otpimem This gives 2580 µL of each mix ( 180 µL spare)
Make a 500x of Oligomycin/antimycin solution. The final concentration in the well is: oligo: 1 micromolar (µM) antimycin: 10 micromolar (µM)
Treat cell with Oligomycin/antimycin A for 24:00:00 . OA should be added 48:00:00 after the addition of the siRNA. Include DMSO control.

Add 4 µL of this 500x solution will be to each well. For a 100 µL of 500x solution, we use: A B 1 Compound Quantity 2 Antimycin A 50 mM solution 10 ul 3 Oligomycin 6.4 mM solution 7.8 ul 4 DMSO 82.2 ul
Prepare working stock of MLi2 at a concentration of 100 micromolar (µM) in DMSO.
Treat cells with MLi2( 10 nanomolar (nM) ) for 01:30:00 (2 ul/well).
Lyse cells using 50 µL of Lysis buffer/well
Lysate can be precleared by centrifugation 17000 x g, , for 00:15:00 at 4 °C .
Perform protein estimation and subject lysate to immunoblotting.
creator: Francesca Tonelli
